scripts.install:all: cd backend/shared && npm install && cd ../mirror-forward && npm install && cd ../packet-parser && npm install && cd ../trace-retrieval && npm install && cd ../data-ingestion && npm install && cd ../../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev:mirror-forward" "npm run dev:packet-parser" "npm run dev:trace-retrieval" "npm run dev:data-ingestion"
scripts.build: npm run build:mirror-forward && npm run build:packet-parser && npm run build:trace-retrieval && npm run build:data-ingestion && npm run build:frontend
